findings.issue: Shared university data is not centralized in university.json and is duplicated as generic text inside program records.
findings.proposed_fix: Move shared admissions, deadlines, documents, and related graduate-wide rules into university.json, then remove duplicated generic copies from individual programs.

findings.issue: official_program_url is null for every program record even though BAU publishes official program pages.
findings.proposed_fix: Populate official_program_url with the official BAU program page for each record.

findings.issue: Tuition is not populated at program level and fee mappings are empty.
findings.proposed_fix: Parse the official BAU tuition PDF into program-level tuition objects and keep null only where BAU does not publish a value.

findings.issue: Source provenance is incomplete because access dates are missing from sources.json.
findings.proposed_fix: Add access_date fields to each source entry while preserving existing source IDs and URLs.

findings.issue: Maven compile validation could not be executed from this folder because ./mvnw is absent.
findings.proposed_fix: Run the compile check from the actual Maven project root or add the missing wrapper before rerunning validation.

final_assessment: The BAU dataset requires further corrections before V30 DB seeding.
